import React from "react"; import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; export default function DemoLicenseModal({ open, onClose }) { if (!open) return null; const stop = (e) => e.stopPropagation(); return (

{/* CONTENT WRAPPER (scrolls if needed) */}
{/* header */}
Demo Screening License
This demo film can be screened only once. After playback, access expires automatically.
{/* main */}

DAWN

1
Download Demo Film
Download the secure demo film file through CineBridge.
Download & Install Secure Player
Install the CineBridge Player required for playback.

Play Demo in Player
Open the player and enjoy the demo film one time.

); } const S = { // FIX: don't vertically center (causes clipping on shorter screens) backdrop: { position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.66)", display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", // ✅ key fix justifyContent: "center", padding: 16, zIndex: 999, overflowY: "auto", // ✅ if needed }, // FIX: cap modal height and allow scroll modal: { position: "relative", width: "min(1060px, 100%)", marginTop: 16, // ✅ breathing room from top borderRadius: 10, overflow: "hidden", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.30)", boxShadow: "0 30px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.75)", color: "#fff", maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 32px)", // ✅ key fix }, // This is what actually scrolls inside the modal content: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, overflowY: "auto", // ✅ key fix maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 32px)", // match modal cap }, modalBg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", filter: "brightness(1.12) contrast(1.06) saturate(1.06)", transform: "scale(1.02)", zIndex: 0, }, modalVignette: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(70% 70% at 50% 20%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.62) 100%)", zIndex: 1, pointerEvents: "none", }, header: { padding: "22px 24px 14px", display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 18, textAlign: "center", }, 1.35, textShadow: "0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", maxWidth: 820, marginLeft: "auto", marginRight: "auto", }, closeBtn: { border: 0, background: "transparent", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.70)", fontSize: 28, cursor: "pointer", padding: 6, lineHeight: 1, transform: "translateY(-2px)", }, main: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "360px 1fr", gap: 18, padding: "14px 24px 18px", }, posterCard: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.10), rgba(0,0,0,0.55)), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 35%, rgba(255,170,80,0.30), rgba(255,170,80,0.00) 62%)", display: "grid", placeItems: "center", }, posterText1: { fontSize: 34, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: 1, opacity: 0.9, textShadow: "0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, posterText2: { marginTop: -10, fontSize: 30, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: 1, opacity: 0.9, textShadow: "0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, posterMetaRow: { marginTop: 10, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, color: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 8, border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.22)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", backdropFilter: "blur(2px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(2px)", padding: "16px 18px", display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "54px 1fr", gap: 14, alignItems: "center", overflow: "hidden", }, stepGlow: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, bottom: -2, height: 2, background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", }, stepDesc: { marginTop: 6, fontSize: 16, opacity: 0.75, lineHeight: 1.35, }, bottom: { borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.18)", padding: "18px 24px 26px", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.20)", backdropFilter: "blur(2px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(2px)", textAlign: "center", }, bottomTitle: { fontSize: 36, fontWeight: 700, opacity: 0.9, textShadow: "0 10px 26px 22, lineHeight: 1, textShadow: "0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.34)", }, playTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "9px solid transparent", borderBottom: "9px solid transparent", borderLeft: "14px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95)", transform: "translateY(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.25))", }, };
